default_language.info: The language the program is initially set to when it is started without an explicit language argument.

delete_attempts.info: When set to true, clears the practice directory upon completion of an algorithm, when exiting practice of an algorithm, or when exiting the program.

prepopulate_boilerplate.info: When set to true, includes the necessary class and method declaration when initializing a practice file, as well as the necessary imports and classes corresponding to the declaration.

tab_size.info: The number of spaces to use as a tab when prepopulating a practice file with text.
